case_title: REBECCA HERNANDEZ VS. DANIEL DE JESUS YEPEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEPEZ, DANIEL DE JESUS $4,138.35 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,228.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2021 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DANIEL DE JESUS YEPEZ IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO APR-02-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF REBECCA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL DE JESUS IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED AUG-13-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YEPEZ, DANIEL DE JESUS
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT YEPEZ, DANIEL DE JESUS
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS)- GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT YEPEZ, DANIEL DE JESUS
REMARK: EXHIBITS SUBMITTED FROM IVIZ MONTES FOR DEFENDANT - FORWARD TO DEPT 506
ORDER MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED. CASE HEARD.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-03-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF REBECCA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL DE JESUS IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A $3378 PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF, AT $700 PER MONTH FOR 5 MONTHS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEP-03-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,663.88 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT YEPEZ, DANIEL DE JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S CURRENT MAILING ADDRESS. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, REBECCA
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT YEPEZ, DANIEL DE JESUS HEARING SET FOR APR-02-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTIONTO JAN-29-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK, (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF REBECCA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. WITNESS FOR THE PLAINTIFF YOHANA FLORES. DEFENDANT DANIEL DE JESUS YEPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
